creator: coco@executive-computing.de
text:
Created attachment 143847
froxlor-0.9.32_1.patch

- Add WANT_PHP_CLI, since froxlor cron jobs rely on the cli sapi
- Add WANT_PHP_MOD due to separation of Apache PHP5 module
- Use WWWGRP/WWWOWN in pkg-plist
- Add option for depending on dns/bind99 from base
- Remove superfluous NEED_ROOT
- Bump PORTREVISION to 1

This is a cleanup for the previously submitted patch by ek@purplehat.org, which much to anyones surprise was suddenly committed while we were working on it :)
